calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-23-2026 Continued To Sep-09-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-09-2025 Continued To May-06-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION
Off Calendar Aug-29-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS RESTORATION HARDWARE, INC., AND RESTORATION HARDWARE HOLDINGS INC.'s MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION.

Defendant Restoration Hardware Inc.'s motion to compel arbitration and stay is granted. Defendant Restoration Hardware Holdings, Inc's motion to compel arbitration and stay is denied as moot. Plaintiff dismissed that entity on July 22, 2025. Defendant Restoration Hardware Inc. argues that defendant Maria Jose is entitled to arbitrate. Moving counsel does not represent Jose and the record fails to show that plaintiff has even served Jose. The court therefore orders no relief regarding defendant Jose.

(See word minutes for complete details)

Proposed order submitted.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)
